pr.title: Non-record: SwiGLU + EMA + TTT Memorization Analysis (val_bpb=1.1679)

output.summary: Combines int5-quantized SwiGLU+EMA architecture with pruning and a sliding-window diagnostic plus cosine LR scheduling to detect TTT memorization.
techniques: TTT memorization diagnostic comparing sliding eval versus loop scores
global cosine LR with per-layer multipliers for multi-epoch TTT
SwiGLU+EMA int5-quantized 10-layer model with pruning and BigramHash
